Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I always wondered what they meant by "hard" science fiction.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}So the last time I passed by this theater, I asked the ticket clerk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}He said, "It's a science fiction story that could actually happen."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I actually don't find movies about far away galaxies or magic and spellcasting that interesting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I like movies that make you think, "Ten years down the road, maybe this could happen."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You get to see a familiar world, but just slightly more advanced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I think it's fun to imagine our world slowly changing like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Oh, sorry! I got a little carried away. We still haven't even seen the movie yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}GOOD MORNING, MASTER. THERE ARE NO CHANGES TO YOUR REGULAR SCHEDULE TODAY.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I'm so bored. When will I meet my shining android prince atop a gallant white steed...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I got a look at what life could[n]be like in the near future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And learned about cutting-edge[n]scientific theories...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Wow, that was amazing. I wonder if our civilization will ever advance that far...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 21 6 7}Like, did you see that iron!? It got rid of the wrinkles on their clothes in half a second.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}To get that much heat out of an iron so quickly, you'd probably have to keep it charged.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Though it wouldn't have to be with electricity. It could be gas-powered, or even a hybrid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Or maybe they have a totally new energy source! But they'd still need some sort of system to send energy into the iron...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}{f 4 21 6 11}The movie got me all excited, so I got a bit carried away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Anyway, I hope we can come again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to[n]the dorm with Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
